title: dolichos palmatifidus
intro: Dolichos palmatifidus is a type of plant commonly known as the bean trefoil, a member of the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, Dolichos palmatifidus has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Dolichos palmatifidus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
